title: Supply Chain Manager - Grofers Logistics - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Grofers Logistics - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Grofers Logistics! We are hiring a Supply Chain Manager for our Bhopal team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Grofers Logistics:
Grofers Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grofers Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
